message:
test(fcp-core): pin LeaseValidationError 7-variant Display + LeasePurpose 6-variant Display+serde (flywheel_connectors-wdmd7)

Bead asks for LeaseRenewalReason variant Display + serde pinning. No type
literally named LeaseRenewalReason exists in fcp-core; the closest
"reason"-shaped analogue is LeaseValidationError at lease.rs:609 — its 7
variants enumerate the reasons a lease (including a renewal) is rejected.
The canonical stale-renewal case is Superseded { held_seq, current_seq }.
LeasePurpose at lease.rs:53 is the input feeding PurposeMismatch.

Coverage: every LeaseValidationError variant Display phrase pinned
verbatim (Expired, SubjectMismatch, ZoneMismatch, PurposeMismatch,
Superseded, CoordinatorMismatch, InsufficientQuorum), payload
preservation in rendered string for u64 + ObjectId + ZoneId +
TailscaleNodeId + LeasePurpose fields, distinct-Display sentinel across
all 7 variants, std::error::Error impl. LeasePurpose 6-variant
snake_case Display, serde matches Display, CBOR encodes as Text scalar
(not tagged map), PascalCase rejection sentinel, distinct serialization
across all 6 variants.

14 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-wdmd7 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test lease_renewal_reason_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
